title: Dr. Strangelove or: How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love the Bomb
posterAlt: Dr. Strangelove or: How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love the Bomb (1964) movie poster
tmdbOverview: After the insane General Jack D. Ripper initiates a nuclear strike on the Soviet Union, a war room full of politicians, generals and a Russian diplomat all frantically try to stop it.
synopsis: Dr. Strangelove or: How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love the Bomb is a 1964 comedy and war film from United Kingdom and United States. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.3 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 1960s and genre rankings. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
